overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player navigates wet multi-lane streets beneath holographic advertisements and overpasses, executes a right turn at an intersection, and comes to a stop behind a large yellow truck before maneuvering around it to continue through the cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane cyberpunk arterial road beneath neon overpasses

events.description: accelerating through wet streets, speed increasing from 6 to 26 km/h
passing white sedan driving in adjacent lane on the right
approaching intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed through rain-soaked neon-lit streets, passing under green-lit overpasses and accelerating to 46 km/h

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in the right lane
motorcycle visible ahead in the distance

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with cyan neon strip lighting underneath
tall building covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage
rotating holographic display showing a red sports car advertisement
rain-soaked asphalt surface reflecting cyan and magenta neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk arterial road. The vehicle accelerates beneath massive green-lit overpasses while holographic advertisements glow on surrounding buildings. The player passes a white sedan and approaches an intersection, with wet roads creating vivid reflections of the neon-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with dense neon signage

events.description: slowing down and executing a right turn at the intersection
entering commercial district dominated by large red 'KABAYAN' neon signage
navigating through intersection with active traffic lights

agents.ego_description: making a right turn at the intersection and continuing through the commercial district with moderate speed

entered.detail: large prominent red neon sign with 'KABAYAN' text mounted on building facade
building with distinctive blue illuminated facade and large windows
safety barriers with yellow reflective strips along the sidewalk edge
line of palm trees with trunks illuminated by street lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows and executes a right turn into a commercial district characterized by dense neon signage. The prominent red 'KABAYAN' sign becomes visible ahead as the car navigates past blue-lit buildings and yellow street barriers. The environment shifts from the wide arterial road to a more enclosed commercial street with shop fronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: street blocked by stationary vehicle beneath pedestrian overpass

events.description: approaching and coming to a stop behind a large yellow armored truck blocking the lane
vehicle comes to a complete stop, speed drops to 0 km/h
rain intensifies on windshield, creating heavier droplet patterns

agents.ego_description: brought the vehicle to a complete stop behind a large stationary truck and waiting for it to move

notable_agents.action: large yellow armored truck stopped in the lane ahead, blocking the road with its rear lights illuminated

entered.detail: elevated walkway structure with red neon strip lighting underneath the walkway
large digital screen displaying an advertisement with a samurai figure
tall cylindrical structure projecting rotating holographic advertisements
tall building facade with vertical neon signage in cyan and red

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and stops behind a large yellow armored truck that is blocking the lane. The scene is dominated by a pedestrian overpass with red neon lighting to the right and holographic advertisements visible in the distance. The car remains stationary for an extended period, with rain continuing to fall on the windshield, before the truck begins to show signs of moving.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: steering left to maneuver around the stationary yellow truck
passing under massive elevated highway structure with concrete pillars
approaching next intersection with green traffic light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering around the left side of the stationary truck and accelerating down the open street

notable_agents.action: yellow truck now visible on the right side as the car passes it

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support columns and green neon accents
concrete wall covered in colorful cyberpunk street art and murals
various storefront signs with mixed Japanese and English text in bright neon colors

segments.scene_description: The vehicle pulls out from behind the truck and accelerates past it on the left side. The scene opens up to reveal an elevated highway structure ahead with massive concrete pillars. The car passes colorful graffiti walls and neon shop signs before approaching the next intersection, with the wet road continuing to reflect the vibrant neon lighting of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from a high-speed arterial road into a dense commercial district. It begins with a rapid acceleration beneath massive green-lit overpasses and glowing holographic advertisements, where the wet pavement creates vivid reflections of the neon environment. As the vehicle slows, the scene shifts from the wide road into a more enclosed commercial street, executing a right turn past blue-lit buildings and a prominent red KABAYAN sign. The momentum then halts behind a large yellow armored truck beneath a red-lit pedestrian overpass, where the camera remains stationary amidst falling rain before the truck finally moves. The shot concludes as the vehicle pulls out and accelerates past the truck, opening up toward an elevated highway structure with massive concrete pillars and graffiti-covered walls.
